name: Services Using Outdated TLS Versions
description: Identifies services still supporting TLS 1.0 or TLS 1.1 which are deprecated
query: SELECT id, hostname, port, tls_versions_supported FROM tls_endpoints WHERE 'TLSv1.0' = ANY(tls_versions_supported) OR 'TLSv1.1' = ANY(tls_versions_supported)
remediation: Disable TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 on the server. Configure the server to only support TLS 1.2 and TLS 1.3.
